message:
refactor(output): replace println! with Output abstraction for stats

Migrate stats command output from direct println! calls to the Output
abstraction layer for consistent formatting and testability:

- Replace println!("{json}") with output.print(&json) for JSON output
- Replace println! for TOON format with output.print()
- Replace println! with format strings for colored banner text
- Update Overview section to use output.print() with markup

This enables output redirection for testing and consistent formatting
across different output modes (stdout, file, buffer).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
